describes: Three derived quantities computed from the fully fscrunched + tscrunched profile: peak-S/N (psrchive's "snr"), the mean intensity in the off-pulse window, and its RMS.  Used to sanity-check the calibration and zap before TOA generation.

spans.label: off:avg  —  mean off-pulse intensity (should be ~0 after baseline removal)
off:rms  —  RMS of the off-pulse window (the "noise floor")
